selections.name: Some R Blessed
selections.reason: Massive upgrade on the sloppy track; has proven wet-track form and fits the class profile perfectly in this off-the-turf scenario.

selections.name: Collectorate
selections.reason: Another proven mudlark who has won on a sloppy surface before. Will relish the conditions and the distance.

selections.name: Letmeknowbeforeugo
selections.reason: Boasts strong recent form and tactical speed that should translate well to the main track despite the surface switch.

selections.name: Man On The Moon
selections.reason: Drawn the rail and has solid back-class. Won recently on fast dirt and has hit the board on wet tracks previously.

danger_horse.name: Trap Line
danger_horse.reason: Has back-class and speed figures that make him a threat if he handles the sloppy going.

selections.name: Doom Loop
selections.reason: Has run well on a muddy track previously and projects to get a favorable stalking trip in this off-the-turf route.

selections.name: Slush Fund
selections.reason: Showed ability on a wet track in the past and gets a significant weight break with the apprentice jockey.

selections.name: Mark Of Greatness
selections.reason: Consistent speed figures and should be forwardly placed from an inside draw.

selections.name: They Not Like Us
selections.reason: Dropping in class and stretching out; could find the sloppy main track to his liking.

danger_horse.name: Team Ramajama
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw could allow him to save ground and hit the board at a price.

selections.name: Bailey's Girl
selections.reason: Standout speed and class figures. The cutback to 6 furlongs on the dirt suits her perfectly.

selections.name: Miss Teca
selections.reason: Strong recent form and possesses the tactical speed to stay out of the kickback on the sloppy track.

selections.name: Sister Sola
selections.reason: Consistent performer with high speed figures; should get a great stalking trip from the inside.

selections.name: Quince
selections.reason: Outside draw keeps her clean and she has the back-class to contend in this field.

danger_horse.name: Zena Cat
danger_horse.reason: High class rating and good form make her a legitimate threat to hit the ticket.

selections.name: New Commission
selections.reason: Strong class rating and solid recent form. Should appreciate the pace scenario here.

selections.name: Toast To Coast
selections.reason: Excellent recent form and tactical speed. Will be prominent early and has the stamina for the mile.

selections.name: He's A Shooter
selections.reason: Has won on an off track before and gets the rail draw to save ground.

selections.name: Beachwalker
selections.reason: Consistent speed figures and should get a favorable stalking trip.

danger_horse.name: Self Taught
danger_horse.reason: Capable of popping a big figure on his best day and fits well at this claiming level.

selections.name: Dancing King
selections.reason: Solid speed figures and projects to get a perfect stalking trip behind the early speed.

selections.name: Fernando's Gold
selections.reason: Good recent form and draws well inside to secure a forward position.

selections.name: Union Branch
selections.reason: Consistent performer who can close late if the pace melts down.

selections.name: Red Roscoe
selections.reason: Has the back-class to compete here and should appreciate the outside draw to stay clean.

danger_horse.name: Candy For Cynthia
danger_horse.reason: High class rating makes him a dangerous overlay if he can overcome the outside post.

selections.name: Vingativa
selections.reason: Standout speed and class figures in this weak field. The outside draw is perfect for her running style.

selections.name: Wild Looker
selections.reason: Ties for top speed figures and should be right there at the wire if she handles the sloppy track.

selections.name: Alter The Stars
selections.reason: Consistent form and draws well inside to save ground.

selections.name: Lino And Me
selections.reason: Solid recent form and should get a good trip from the inside post.

danger_horse.name: In To The Night
danger_horse.reason: Capable of hitting the board at a price if the pace sets up for her.

selections.name: Winit
selections.reason: Massive class and speed advantage over this field. Should dominate if he handles the off track.

selections.name: Atta Boy Anthony
selections.reason: Strong recent form and high speed figures make him the clear second choice.

selections.name: Daneland
selections.reason: Outside draw keeps him clean and he has the stamina to close late.

selections.name: Hard Astray
selections.reason: Consistent performer who can hit the board underneath.

danger_horse.name: Leo And Royal
danger_horse.reason: Has back-class and could wake up at a price in this spot.

selections.name: Something Sweet
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the field and excellent recent form. The outside draw is ideal.

selections.name: Have A Happy
selections.reason: Strong speed and class figures; should be forwardly placed from the inside.

selections.name: Sagcy
selections.reason: Consistent performer who should get a good stalking trip.

selections.name: Face Of Shadows
selections.reason: Rail draw and solid speed figures make her a contender for the exotics.

danger_horse.name: La Neto
danger_horse.reason: Good recent form and has the tactical speed to be dangerous.
